tool_access.name: read_file
tool_access.description: Reads the contents of a file from the codebase.

tool_access.name: list_directory
tool_access.description: Lists files and subdirectories within the project root.

tool_access.name: write_output_file
tool_access.description: Writes generated code, diffs, or documentation to a designated output directory. Does not overwrite source files directly.

tool_access.name: run_linter
tool_access.description: Runs the project's configured linter (e.g., ESLint, Ruff) on specified files.

tool_access.name: run_tests
tool_access.description: Executes the project's test suite or a specified subset of tests.

tool_access.name: generate_diff
tool_access.description: Produces a unified diff between the original and proposed code changes.

known_risks.risk: Agent reads source code which may contain internal business logic, proprietary algorithms, or undocumented security assumptions.
known_risks.mitigation: Agent is scoped to read-only access of the codebase. Output is written to a separate directory and reviewed by a developer before any changes are applied. Source files cannot be modified directly.

known_risks.risk: Generated code suggestions may introduce subtle bugs or security vulnerabilities not caught by automated linting.
known_risks.mitigation: All generated code requires human code review before merge. Agent-generated changes are clearly labeled in commit messages.

known_risks.risk: LLM may hallucinate API signatures or library behavior if context window is insufficient.
known_risks.mitigation: Outputs are clearly labeled as AI-generated drafts. Developers are instructed to verify against official documentation.
